query: SELECT id, name, category FROM appLinks WHERE category IN ('learning','school') AND name NOT IN ('Educational ','Khanmigo (Khan Academy AI tutor)','Kimi AI','Mystery Science','Ohio Learning Standards','Planets Recap Video','Stellarium Mobile','Adobe Spark','Aimswebplus','BrainPOP','Class Dojo','Clever','Edpuzzle','iCivics','IXL') ORDER BY category, name;
